aeo_readiness.summary: AI assistants are unlikely to cite this business due to significant gaps in structured data and conversational content. While they have a strong local presence, they lack the technical and content optimizations needed for AI visibility.
quick_wins: Create an FAQ page with common HVAC queries and detailed answers

gbp_analysis.summary: The Google Business Profile is well-optimized with positive reviews, photos, and accurate information, but lacks regular posts and Q&A engagement to boost visibility.
critical_issues: No engagement in the Q&A section

nap_citations.summary: NAP consistency is perfect with no issues detected across all citations.

schema_gaps: No HowTo schema for common HVAC tasks
No Product schema for services offered

ai_visibility_gap.primary_gap: Lack of structured data and conversational content
ai_visibility_gap.invisible_for: Local HVAC service queries where AI assistants prioritize detailed, structured information
ai_visibility_gap.low_hanging_fruit: Implementing LocalBusiness and FAQ schema markup
ai_visibility_gap.authority_opportunity: Positioning as local HVAC experts by creating in-depth content on common HVAC issues and solutions

agency_pitch.hook: Unlock AI-driven leads by making your business the go-to HVAC expert in San Jose.
agency_pitch.pain_point: Without AI optimization, they are missing out on 40% of potential leads from voice and AI search queries.
agency_pitch.proof_point: Their website lacks essential schema markup and conversational content, making it less likely for AI assistants to recommend them.
agency_pitch.solution: Our AEO approach integrates technical SEO with conversational content strategies, ensuring AI models recognize and recommend your business as the top HVAC provider in San Jose.
agency_pitch.impact_estimate: Expect a 30-40% increase in AI-driven leads within the first 6 months.
agency_pitch.urgency: Competitors are already optimizing for AI search; the longer you wait, the more ground you lose.

email_subject_line: Unlock AI-driven HVAC leads in San Jose - Act Now!
opening_line: We analyzed your website and identified critical gaps in AI visibility that are likely costing you valuable leads.
cta: Let's schedule a call to discuss how we can optimize your online presence for AI search and boost your lead generation.
page_title: Airtify Heating and Air Conditioning – A family operated HVAC company serving the San Jose, CA area – the future of comfort is here.
